creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rodrigo
Date: Fri Oct  3 21:46:57 UTC 2014
New revision: 369939
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/369939

Log:
  Upgrade rodent file manager to v5.2.9
  The rodent project split the code in 3 parts, rodent itself and
  two shared libraries, librfm and libtubo.
  Librfm and libtubo are new ports because they evolve separately
  and can be used by other ports.

  PR:		ports/193561
  Submitted by:	rodrigo
  Approved by:	mentors (implicit)

Changes:
  head/x11-fm/librfm/
  head/x11-fm/librfm/Makefile
  head/x11-fm/librfm/distinfo
  head/x11-fm/librfm/pkg-descr
  head/x11-fm/librfm/pkg-plist
  head/x11-fm/libtubo/
  head/x11-fm/libtubo/Makefile
  head/x11-fm/libtubo/distinfo

  head/x11-fm/libtubo/pkg-descr
  head/x11-fm/libtubo/pkg-plist
  head/x11-fm/rodent/Makefile
  head/x11-fm/rodent/distinfo
  head/x11-fm/rodent/pkg-plist
